results.name: Groups page loads
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: The screen shows an error state with 'Something went wrong' message and a 'Reload Page' button, which indicates the Groups page failed to load properly rather than displaying the expected content or functionality.

results.name: Groups — search bar and category filters visible
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: Page shows an error state with 'Something went wrong' message and a reload button, not the expected Groups page with search input and category filters

results.name: GroupDetail page loads
results.reasoning: The page is displaying a 'Group not found' error message in the center of the screen, which is one of the acceptable states according to the criteria. The app interface is functional with proper navigation sidebar and dark theme styling.

results.name: Events page loads
results.reasoning: Event Discovery page is fully functional with all required elements: 'Event Discovery' heading, search bar, filter controls, event type pill buttons (All Types, Competition, Tournament, Workshop, Training, Meetup, Other), 'Create Event' button, tabs (Discover, For You, My Events), and a proper 'No events found' empty state with helpful message

results.name: Events — filters and type pills visible
results.reasoning: The Events page shows proper filter controls including a search bar for events/sports/locations, a 'Filters' section, and multiple type filter pills (All Types, Competition, Tournament, Workshop, Training, Meetup, Other). The page displays 'No events found' with a suggestion to adjust filters, which is acceptable functionality when no events match the current filter criteria.

results.name: Notifications page loads
results.reasoning: The Notifications page is working correctly. It displays the 'Notifications' heading with bell icon, shows '0 unread notifications', has all the required filter buttons (All, Unread, Likes, Comments, Follows, Requests, Mentions, Streams, Challenges), includes tabs (Notifications, Activity), has a settings gear icon, and shows the proper empty state message 'You're all caught up. Go post something worth noticing.' All elements are functioning as expected.

results.name: Notifications — filter pills visible
results.reasoning: The notifications page correctly displays filter pill buttons including All, Unread, Likes, Comments, Follows, Requests, Mentions, Streams, and Challenges. All filters show '0' counts and the page displays an appropriate empty state message 'You're all caught up' with encouragement to post content. The filter UI is fully functional and visible.

results.name: ForumTopic page loads
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: The forum shows an empty state with 'No topics found. Be the first to start a discussion!' message, indicating no real forum data is being displayed. The feature is not showing actual forum topics or content, just an empty placeholder state.

results.name: Advice page loads
results.reasoning: The premium gate is working correctly, showing a proper upgrade prompt with crown icon, premium feature description, detailed benefits list, and clear $9.99/month upgrade CTA button. This is the expected behavior for non-premium users trying to access the Advice feature.

results.name: Return to Feed from community features
results.reasoning: Feed page is fully functional with real content - user stories are populated at the top, post composition area is available, sport category filters are active, and a real post from Marcus Silva with image content is displayed. All navigation elements are working and the page shows genuine user data rather than empty states or loading indicators.
